cases, the reservation of the vehicle must be made by a member of the faculty
or a senior administrative staff member in the School or by the Student Union
President to the Motor Pool.

llm_annotation.subject: a member of the faculty or a senior administrative staff member in the School or by the Student Union President
llm_annotation.reasoning: The text contains the deontic operator 'must' and specifies an obligation (what must be done) for certain individuals.

original_text:
Student dormitories may be provided for a
maximum period of one month, in case of availability to:
a.

llm_annotation.subject: Student dormitories
llm_annotation.reasoning: The text grants the right to provide student dormitories for a maximum period of one month.

original_text: Invoices are required to be settled by the indicated due date.

llm_annotation.subject: Invoices
llm_annotation.reasoning: The text uses the deontic operator 'required' to specify an obligation.

original_text:
In case of over staying guests, special prior permission must be obtained from
the Director, Office of Facilities and Asset Management (OFAM) and a daily rent
will be charged for the room.

llm_annotation.subject: guests who overstay
llm_annotation.reasoning: The text contains the deontic operator 'must' and specifies an obligation for guests who overstay to obtain prior permission from OFAM and pay a daily rent.

original_text:
Families of non-resident students may not reside on campus if the non-resident student is
off-campus.

llm_annotation.subject: families of non-resident students
llm_annotation.reasoning: The text uses 'may not', which indicates a prohibition, and specifies an action that families of non-resident students cannot do (reside on campus).

original_text:
The duties of non-
instructional teaching assistants may include assisting faculty in preparing materials for
lectures, grading assignments and quizzes, projects, preparing laboratory set-ups, or
posting web-based materials.

llm_annotation.subject: non-instructional teaching assistants
llm_annotation.reasoning: The text does not contain a deontic operator and it is descriptive in nature rather than prescriptive.

original_text:
2.3 Preliminary consultation should be available to any member of the Institute
community who wishes to discuss issues related to problem areas.

llm_annotation.subject: any member of the Institute community
llm_annotation.reasoning: The text does not contain a deontic operator and it is advisory/recommendatory in nature.

original_text: Students may wait for the vans at the Thammasat Road near AIT Gate No.

llm_annotation.subject: Students
llm_annotation.reasoning: The text grants the right to students to wait for vans at a specific location.

original_text:
Writing Placement Test for Registration/Enrolment
All degree program students (including CAS and Certificate leading to Master) must
take the AIT Writing Test (AIT-WT) upon arrival on campus.

llm_annotation.subject: All degree program students (including CAS and Certificate leading to Master)
llm_annotation.reasoning: The text contains the deontic operator 'must' which specifies an obligation for a clear subject.
